title: Pungent Pan Seared American Beetroot Skillet
description: A light and flavorful American dish featuring sauteed beetroot, this pungent pan seared skillet is perfect for a weeknight dinner. The combination of beetroot and spices creates a deliciously pungent flavor profile.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large kazan-cauldron over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until it is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the diced beetroot, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the beetroot is tender.
Add the apple cider vinegar and water, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, until the liquid has reduced slightly.
Serve the pungent pan seared beetroot skillet hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
